sentence: Plato made the causes of things to be matter, ideas, and an efficient _______.
Peisistratus was the first _______ of the Iliad and the Odyssey.
definition: A professional who designs buildings or other structures, or who prepares plans and superintends construction.
A person who plans, devises or contrives the achievement of a desired result.
A title given to architects. Usually capitalized or abbreviated as Arch./Ar. before the person's name.
